# Ridge Perfect Cleaning Solutions

> Professional residential and commercial cleaning services across Palm Beach County, Florida. Better Price · Better Solutions · Perfect Clean.

## About

Ridge Perfect Cleaning Solutions is a locally owned cleaning company serving all of Palm Beach County, FL. We use eco-friendly, plant-based products and background-checked staff. Free, no-obligation quotes.

- Phone: (561) 818-0778
- Email: info@ridgeperfectcleaning.com
- Website: https://ridgeperfectcleaning.com
- Service area: West Palm Beach, Lake Worth, Boynton Beach, Delray Beach, Boca Raton, Palm Beach Gardens, and surrounding areas.

## Services

- Residential Cleaning — tailored home cleaning for every room (from $80)
- Deep Cleaning — intensive top-to-bottom clean, inside appliances, baseboards (from $160)
- Commercial Cleaning — offices and businesses (custom quote)
- Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning — full cleaning for transitions
- Airbnb / Short-Term Rental Cleaning — fast guest-ready turnarounds
- Post-Construction Cleaning — dust and debris removal after builds
- Mobile Car Wash — interior and exterior detailing at your location
- Pressure Washing — driveways, patios, sidewalks, and exteriors

## Contact

- Free quotes via the website contact form, phone, or WhatsApp.
- Languages: English and Spanish.

- [Home](https://ridgeperfectcleaning.com/): Services, pricing, before/after results, reviews, FAQ, contact.
